With the aesthetic appeal of a modern seaside trattoria, Molto boasts sleek interiors, high ceilings, an open kitchen and bar and a feature wood fire pizza oven. The 130-seat restaurant is a celebration of classic Italy set against the beautiful backdrop of Canberra’s Lake Burley Griffin.
